name: libscrapli
readme:
libscrapli
==========

libscrapli is a zig project that aims to provide a unified "core" for scrapli. This is obviously 
useful for the OG scrapli (python flavor) and scrapligo, but possibly for other languages/libraries 
or even for folks who would like to not have to reinvent the wheel for the "core" connection 
handling and logic but want to write their own wrapper!

releases.name: v0.0.1-rc.5
releases.body:
## What's Changed
* Add in-memory private key authentication support for SSH2 transport by @araustin01 in https://github.com/scrapli/libscrapli/pull/20

## New Contributors
* @araustin01 made their first contribution in https://github.com/scrapli/libscrapli/pull/20

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/scrapli/libscrapli/compare/v0.0.1-rc.4...v0.0.1-rc.5
